task_completion.description: Create the first item as a 'Computer Program' in Zotero.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Zotero interface showing a new item created with the 'Computer Program' type (denoted by a specific application/terminal icon in the middle pane and 'Item Type: Computer Program' in the right pane).

task_completion.description: Set the Title and Version for the first item to 'Zotero' and '7.0.11'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Zotero right-hand Info pane, the 'Title' field is exactly 'Zotero' and the 'Version' field is exactly '7.0.11'.

task_completion.description: Set the Company and System for the first item to 'Corporation for Digital Scholarship' and 'Linux'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Zotero right-hand Info pane, the 'Company' field is exactly 'Corporation for Digital Scholarship' and the 'System' field is exactly 'Linux'.

task_completion.description: Create the second item as a 'Computer Program' in Zotero.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Zotero interface showing a second new item created with the 'Computer Program' type.

task_completion.description: Set the Title and Version for the second item to 'PyTorch' and '2.1.0'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Zotero right-hand Info pane, the 'Title' field is exactly 'PyTorch' and the 'Version' field is exactly '2.1.0'.

task_completion.description: Set the Programmer and URL for the second item to 'Meta AI' and 'https://pytorch.org'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Zotero right-hand Info pane, the 'Programmer' field is exactly 'Meta AI' (entered as a single field or Last Name depending on Zotero's author field mode) and the 'URL' field is exactly 'https://pytorch.org'.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Zotero graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the actual Zotero application window being used, rather than terminal commands or scripts editing the Zotero database directly.

integrity.description: The agent entered the information into the actual Zotero Info pane.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text fields being edited are clearly part of Zotero's right-hand Info pane, not a separate text editor or dummy application.

integrity.description: Two distinct items were created in the library.
integrity.visual_evidence: The middle pane of the Zotero window lists two separate entries for the software programs, rather than one item being overwritten.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating two 'Computer Program' items in Zotero. Item 1 must have Title: 'Zotero', Version: '7.0.11', Company: 'Corporation for Digital Scholarship', and System: 'Linux'. Item 2 must have Title: 'PyTorch', Version: '2.1.0', Programmer: 'Meta AI', and URL: 'https://pytorch.org'. All these details are verified as accurate real-world software metadata.
